deployed.problem_statement: Whisper STT fails to properly romanize and split language household names, resulting in incomplete or incorrect transcription.
deployed.proposed_solution_code_outline:
Implement a custom post-STT regex-based fix for common language naming conventions, leveraging existing Whisper-base configuration files.
Update tooling to include a dictionary of known language family names with correct romanization and splitting patterns.

deployed.problem_statement: Any file tool must jail to ./docs, forbidding ../ traversal and absolute paths outside the jail.
deployed.proposed_solution_code_outline: Implement a jailed file access enforcer using pathlib and stdlib, ensuring all file operations adhere to directory constraints.
